text:
Created attachment 242869
ERROR lines

(In reply to Namkhai B. from comment #12)

Subsequent ERROR lines from /var/log/netdata/error.log

An extract: 

P[freebsd] : FREEBSD: sysctl(dev.cpu.0.temperature...) failed: No such file or directory (errno 2, No such file or directory)
P[freebsd] : FREEBSD: sysctl(net.inet.tcp.stats...) failed: Cannot allocate memory (errno 12, Cannot allocate memory)
P[freebsd] : FREEBSD: sysctl(kstat.zfs.misc.zio_trim.bytes...) failed: No such file or directory (errno 2, No such file or directory)
